name: Symphony
description: A symphony is a large-scale musical work written for a full orchestra, usually in multiple movements with contrasting moods and tempos. Symphonies often take listeners on a journey, moving from dramatic and powerful sections to calm and emotional ones.
kid_friendly_explanation: A big musical story played by a whole orchestra with different parts that feel like chapters.

name: Concerto
description: A concerto features a solo instrument playing in contrast with an orchestra. The soloist often shows off technical skill while interacting musically with the ensemble. Concertos are exciting because they feel like a musical conversation or competition.
kid_friendly_explanation: One instrument gets to be the star while the orchestra plays along and answers it.

name: Opera
description: Opera is a theatrical form of classical music where singers perform a dramatic story using music, acting, and often elaborate staging. The orchestra accompanies the singers and helps express emotions and action.
kid_friendly_explanation: A musical play where people sing the story instead of talking.

name: Ballet
description: Ballet music is written specifically for dance performances. It often tells a story through movement and music, with clear rhythms and expressive melodies to match the dancers.
kid_friendly_explanation: Music that people dance to while telling a story with their bodies.

name: Chamber Music
description: Chamber music is written for a small group of musicians, where each player has an important role. It is more intimate than orchestral music and allows for detailed interaction between instruments.
kid_friendly_explanation: A small group of musicians playing together, like a musical conversation.

name: Solo Instrumental
description: Solo instrumental music is written for a single instrument without accompaniment. It highlights the full expressive range and technical abilities of that instrument.
kid_friendly_explanation: One instrument playing all by itself, showing everything it can do.

name: Orchestral Suite
description: An orchestral suite is a collection of shorter pieces or movements grouped together, often extracted from larger works like ballets or operas.
kid_friendly_explanation: A set of short musical pieces played one after another.

name: Symphonic Poem
description: A symphonic poem is a single-movement orchestral work that tells a story or paints a picture through music. It is often inspired by literature, art, or nature.
kid_friendly_explanation: Music that tells a story or paints a picture without words.

name: Mass
description: A mass is a large choral work set to the traditional texts of the Catholic church. It often includes choir, soloists, and orchestra, and can be both spiritual and highly dramatic.
kid_friendly_explanation: Big choral music with many voices singing together, often used in church.

name: Requiem
description: A requiem is a special type of mass written in memory of someone who has died. It often has a serious and emotional tone.
kid_friendly_explanation: Music written to remember someone and express deep feelings.

name: Art Song (Lied)
description: An art song is a short piece for voice and piano that sets poetry to music. It is intimate and expressive, focusing on storytelling and emotion.
kid_friendly_explanation: A short song where someone sings a poem with piano.

name: Oratorio
description: An oratorio is a large musical work for orchestra, choir, and soloists, similar to opera but without staging or costumes. It often tells a religious or historical story.
kid_friendly_explanation: A big story told with singing and orchestra, but without acting on stage.

name: Minimalism
description: Minimalism is a modern style of classical music based on repetition, gradual change, and steady rhythms. It often creates a hypnotic or meditative effect.
kid_friendly_explanation: Music that repeats patterns slowly and changes little by little.
famous_examples: John Adams – Short Ride in a Fast Machine

name: Film Score (Orchestral)
description: Film scores are orchestral compositions written to accompany movies. They often use classical techniques to create emotion, tension, and atmosphere.
kid_friendly_explanation: Music that plays in movies to make scenes feel exciting, sad, or magical.
famous_examples: Howard Shore – Lord of the Rings

name: Program Music
description: Program music is instrumental music that tells a story or describes something outside of music, such as a scene, idea, or narrative.
kid_friendly_explanation: Music that is about something, like a story or picture.

name: Sacred Music
description: Sacred music is written for religious purposes, often performed in churches or spiritual settings. It can include choral works, masses, and hymns.
kid_friendly_explanation: Music written for church or spiritual moments.

name: Dance Forms
description: Dance forms include structured pieces originally written for dancing, such as waltzes, minuets, and gavottes. These often have clear rhythms and elegant patterns.
kid_friendly_explanation: Music that people used to dance to, with clear beats and patterns.

name: String Quartet
description: A string quartet is a chamber music ensemble consisting of two violins, one viola, and one cello. It is one of the most important and expressive forms in classical music, often featuring deep musical conversations between the instruments.
kid_friendly_explanation: Four string instruments talking to each other through music.

name: Piano Trio
description: A piano trio consists of piano, violin, and cello. It combines the richness of the piano with the expressive qualities of strings, creating a balanced and versatile sound.
kid_friendly_explanation: A piano and two string instruments playing together like a small team.

name: String Quintet
description: A string quintet expands the string quartet by adding an extra instrument, often a second viola or cello, creating a richer and deeper texture.
kid_friendly_explanation: Like a string quartet but with one extra instrument for a bigger sound.

name: Wind Quintet
description: A wind quintet is a chamber group of five woodwind instruments: flute, oboe, clarinet, bassoon, and French horn. It offers a wide range of colors and textures.
kid_friendly_explanation: Five different wind instruments playing together, each with a unique sound.

name: Piano Sonata
description: A piano sonata is a multi-movement work for solo piano, often exploring a wide range of emotions and technical possibilities.
kid_friendly_explanation: A big piece for piano with different parts that feel like a story.

name: Etude
description: An etude is a short piece designed to develop a specific technical skill, but many are also musically expressive and performed in concerts.
kid_friendly_explanation: A practice piece that also sounds like a real concert piece.

name: Nocturne
description: A nocturne is a lyrical, expressive piece often inspired by the night. It typically has a calm and reflective mood.
kid_friendly_explanation: Soft, dreamy music that feels like nighttime.

name: Prelude
description: A prelude is a short piece that can stand alone or serve as an introduction to a larger work. It often explores a single mood or idea.
kid_friendly_explanation: A short piece that sets a mood or feeling.

name: Opera Buffa
description: Opera buffa is a comedic style of opera featuring lighthearted stories, humorous situations, and lively music.
kid_friendly_explanation: A funny opera with silly characters and playful music.

name: Opera Seria
description: Opera seria is a serious and dramatic style of opera, often based on historical or mythological themes.
kid_friendly_explanation: A serious opera with big dramatic stories.

name: Grand Opera
description: Grand opera is a large-scale opera with elaborate staging, big choruses, and dramatic storytelling.
kid_friendly_explanation: A very big opera with lots of people, music, and drama.

name: Romantic Ballet
description: Romantic ballet focuses on emotional storytelling, fantasy themes, and expressive music, often featuring magical or supernatural elements.
kid_friendly_explanation: Ballet with magical stories and emotional music.

name: Character Piece
description: A character piece is a short composition that represents a specific mood, idea, or scene, often with a descriptive title.
kid_friendly_explanation: A short piece that feels like a picture or a character.

name: Tone Poem
description: A tone poem is another name for a symphonic poem, focusing on storytelling through orchestral music.
kid_friendly_explanation: Music that tells a story using instruments instead of words.

name: Cantata
description: A cantata is a vocal composition with instrumental accompaniment, often performed in religious settings.
kid_friendly_explanation: A piece with singers and instruments, often performed in church.

name: Chorale
description: A chorale is a simple, hymn-like musical setting often sung by a choir.
kid_friendly_explanation: A simple song sung by a group of people.

name: Waltz
description: A waltz is a dance in triple meter with a graceful and flowing character, often associated with elegance and movement.
kid_friendly_explanation: Music that goes 1-2-3, 1-2-3 and feels like dancing in circles.

name: Minuet
description: A minuet is a stately dance form from the Classical period, often included in symphonies and chamber works.
kid_friendly_explanation: A slow and fancy dance from long ago.

name: Scherzo
description: A scherzo is a fast and playful movement often found in symphonies and sonatas, replacing the traditional minuet.
kid_friendly_explanation: A fast and playful musical joke.

name: Electronic Classical
description: Electronic classical music incorporates synthesizers and digital sounds into classical composition, creating new textures and sonic possibilities.
kid_friendly_explanation: Classical music made with electronic sounds and instruments.
